response:
Subject: Request to Unblock Account – Suspicious Payment Issue  

Dear Google Support,  

I am writing to appeal the recent account block due to suspicious payment activity. I did not make any payments that triggered the block, and I am confident in my account's legitimacy. I would appreciate the opportunity to resolve this issue and restore my account.  

Please review the payment records and verify if there was a misclassification of transactions. I am committed to complying with Google's policies and would be happy to provide additional information if needed.  

Thank you for your assistance. I look forward to a prompt resolution.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
